task: Search for a video using site-relevant keywords using the search bar
Add a video, tv show, or movie to the watchlist.
Edit an existing watchlist by adding or removing a video.
Click on a video to open the player and stream the video
Begin playing a featured video, pause the video, wait a few seconds, and then resume the video
Begin playing a featured video and adjust the volume of the video
Begin playing a featured video and adjust playback speed.
Filter for top videos by popularity or rating.
Begin playing a video, enter fullscreen mode, wait a few seconds, and then exit fullscreen mode.
Begin playing a video, then mute the video
Filter videos by subject or keyword. Use a site-relevant keyword of choice for this
Begin playing any video over 30 seconds, then fast forward the video by 10 seconds
Begin playing any video over 30 seconds, then rewind the video by 10 seconds
Begin playing any video over 30 seconds, then seek to a specific, randomly, chosen timestamp that is shorter than the video length
